seeds.value: Define your growth targets here. Example: Target CAC below industry average. Monthly growth rate target: 15%. Viral coefficient target: 1.2. Primary channels: organic content, referral program, paid social.
seeds.description: Growth targets and KPIs -- used to evaluate experiments and channel performance

seeds.value: Run minimum 3 concurrent experiments. Kill any experiment not trending positive after 72 hours or 1000 samples. Require 95% statistical significance before declaring a winner. Always have a control group.
